tweets.text: .@SecBlinken to @IRFSummit: The United States has a strong and enduring commitment to advancing religious freedom for all. #IRFSummit2023 https://t.co/NQ0rxKSeCC

The State Department-supported @observeconflict’s latest report makes clear the magnitude of Russia’s unjustified and horrific destruction of Bakhmut, Ukraine. At least 5,400 buildings have been damaged or destroyed.
View the full report: https://t.co/95yTNpKSpN https://t.co/vIdREzjcd4
Live now! @SecBlinken holds a press availability in Jerusalem. Also streaming on YouTube at: https://t.co/dWNq0haSwn. https://t.co/647o7qSAeD

Acting Deputy Secretary John R. Bass met today with @dutchmfa Secretary General Paul Huijts to share workforce and management strategies that support the State Department’s greatest asset: our workforce. https://t.co/ElbI39hSvD https://t.co/q95wtnSYAu

.@SecBlinken: In my meeting with young Egyptian leaders, I was pleased to see we are thinking together — and we are working together — as Egyptians and Americans, but also as global citizens addressing global challenges. https://t.co/N5SgrveR5i
Live now! @SecBlinken and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu deliver statements to the press in Jerusalem. Also streaming on https://t.co/6h5KeaZKvW.  https://t.co/DSCFccBx7q

Marked by more than a century of diplomatic cooperation and friendship, the U.S.-Egypt partnership continues to thrive. More on our relations with Egypt and the Egyptian people 🇺🇸 🤝 🇪🇬: https://t.co/QDa9i7xRqJ https://t.co/LAxizlXSwk

The HIV/AIDS pandemic continues to be a serious threat to global health, security, and economic development. The United States set a bold goal of accelerating the response to end the HIV/AIDS pandemic as a public health threat by 2030. @PEPFAR's strategy: https://t.co/KAwtY9MqIh
.@POTUS: Putin expected Europe and the United States to weaken our resolve. He expected our support for Ukraine to crumble with time. He was wrong. https://t.co/30kJEBVpdS

.@POTUS: Ukrainians are fighting an age-old battle against aggression and domination. It’s a battle Americans have fought proudly time and again, and it’s a battle we’re going to make sure the Ukrainians are well equipped to fight as well. https://t.co/GblUgzffQR

In 2003, only 50,000 people in Africa were on lifesaving HIV treatment. Now @PEPFAR has saved 25 million+ lives, supports 20.1 million people on HIV treatment globally, and enabled more than 5.5 million babies to be born HIV free. https://t.co/9lRr7gX73L https://t.co/2fysO4qYCJ

Ukrainian women are fighting for their future and a free and democratic Ukraine. We will remain #UnitedWithUkraine for as long as it takes. Tune in January 30 at 9 a.m. EST for a program about these heroic women. https://t.co/XuxzFvZr4x https://t.co/jMp9CeoGMX

The United States continues cooperation with our 🇪🇺 transatlantic partners and allies on artificial intelligence research projects for the benefit of the global scientific community. https://t.co/F02HLGC0zB

We continue to make steady progress to address the gaps that put people at risk, particularly the most vulnerable populations. Our unwavering support is evidenced by the more than $100 billion investment in the global fight to end HIV/AIDS. https://t.co/7I5shBq0gj

Courageous Ukrainian civilians are making extraordinary contributions in support of their country’s freedom in the face of Russia’s aggression. Read Yana Zinkevych's inspiring story of service, sacrifice, and saving lives. https://t.co/9n3huVBos6

In the “Week at State,” @POTUS announces the U.S. will send 31 Abram tanks to support Ukraine, @SecBlinken speaks on U.S. Chairship of the @FO_Coalition, and @DeputySecState visits Cleveland to meet the Ukrainian diaspora community. For the latest, visit https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. https://t.co/vKJD4T3t7b

January 28, 2023, marks the 20th anniversary of President George W. Bush’s State of the Union address first announcing the United States President’s Emergency Plan for AIDS Relief (PEPFAR), the largest commitment by any nation to address a single disease in history. https://t.co/c3xsMwazfm
.@POTUS: The United States, standing shoulder-to-shoulder with our allies and partners, is going to continue to do all we can to support Ukraine. https://t.co/w0btWZx9U9

“The memory of the millions murdered in the Holocaust compels me to work each day for a better and more just world.” Relatives of Holocaust survivors share their families’ memory and how it led them to public service careers at State & @USAID. #NeverAgain https://t.co/OaQ5KChHaq
Live now! @StateDeputySpox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming on https://t.co/8C4kX1rchR. https://t.co/2yPzOp1nJQ

Live now! @SecBlinken and @AmbassadorTai host a virtual ministerial for the Americas Partnership for Economic Prosperity from the State Department. Watch on YouTube:
https://t.co/7QC0XOCj15

Today we reflect on the horrors of the #Holocaust and honor the memory of the 6 million Jews and millions of other people who were murdered. It is up to all of us to fight against antisemitism and discrimination of all forms on #HolocaustRemembranceDay and every day. https://t.co/0rwemUyAaM

.@SecBlinken and @AmbassadorTai will co-host the Americas Partnership for Economic Prosperity virtual ministerial on Jan. 27th at 1 pm EST. Watch the livestream on https://t.co/T9DBimUxNV and follow the conversation using #AmericasPartnership. https://t.co/ueJ9PGsx0e

.@StateDeputySpox on extending Deferred Enforced Departure for Hong Kong residents for another 2 years: This announcement was made necessary by Beijing and Hong Kong authorities’ continued and repeated attacks on the protected rights and freedoms cherished by people in Hong Kong. https://t.co/KFDrSDT1tb

.@StateDeputySpox: We are announcing the designation of former President of Panama @rmartinelli, for his involvement in significant corruption. Specifically, Martinelli accepted bribes in exchange for improperly awarding government contracts during his tenure as president. https://t.co/mTWfmQjjOU
Live now! @StateDeputySpox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming on https://t.co/v07odiuFXT. https://t.co/6DD4JiGF8u

.@POTUS said PEPFAR’s new strategy “will help create a future where every HIV infection is prevented, every person has access to treatment, and every generation can live free from the stigma that too often surrounds AIDS.” Read about 20 years of @PEPFAR: https://t.co/AiSMjofOUu

At @TheCityClub of Cleveland, @DeputySecState shared a vision of a Ukraine that is open and safe, democratic and secure, still inspiring and always free. We are all focused on standing with Ukraine for as long as it takes. https://t.co/qbo0JV8SR7

.@StateDeptSpox on U.S. Chairship of the @FO_Coalition: We are excited to continue strengthening our partnership with like-minded governments, civil society, industry, and other relevant stakeholders to reclaim the promise of the Internet. https://t.co/N47tLjy3rX
Live now! @StateDeptSpox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming on https://t.co/pf5Rmr3oBE. https://t.co/O7U8S2qOJ0

In coordination with the UK & the EU, we designated additional Iranian officials & an entity connected to human rights abuses against peaceful protestors. We stand with the Iranian people as they bravely defend their human rights and fundamental freedoms. https://t.co/7BNfJIQC8Y https://t.co/L0kUulV1TA

As Chair of the @FO_Coalition in 2023, the United States looks forward to working together with governments, civil society, academia, and industry to forge a pathway towards a rights-based, democratic, and digitally inclusive world. https://t.co/3aBqS1lFDu

On January 26, at 1 p.m. EST, join @stategwi, @state_sca, and #USIndia Alliance @shatterfund to hear about ways the U.S. and India are collaborating to promote women’s economic security. #ShatterSummit Visit https://t.co/yoiZQJdrWv https://t.co/U27frCBDXz

.@StateDeptSpox on today’s @G7 + meeting: The Secretary applauded tremendous efforts by our Allies and partners to coordinate complicated logistics, procurements & delivery of critical equipment to help Ukraine repair its electricity system and maintain energy sector resilience. https://t.co/X4fITa6tCo
Live now! @StateDeptSpox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming on https://t.co/0I5m9ZFWYO. https://t.co/cxvspYo4ni

Education is fundamental to our future. On #InternationalDayOfEducation, we are proud to share some of the ways we support education and create learning opportunities here in the United States and abroad. Learn more: https://t.co/nZL0K5JEvE https://t.co/pcnsNw6Azt

“We depend upon our American artists to join in our country’s diplomacy.” We are welcoming The Beatbox House—@USAmusicabroad’s first-ever beatboxing group—to the mix. Check out how Americans are contributing to the global music scene and fostering people-to-people connections.

U.S. assistance to support Pakistan’s recovery from 2022 floods has now reached $200 million+ since August. The funding will strengthen agriculture, food security, and health services in flood-affected areas while improving Pakistan’s climate resilience. https://t.co/EsZuhzh0e8

.@SecBlinken: The resilience of Ukrainians has been extraordinary, and fundamentally the reason that they [Russia] won’t succeed is the Ukrainians are fighting for their land, for their country, for their future; the Russians are not. https://t.co/I6x1bF2Pwk

At @UChiPolitics, @SecBlinken spoke about public service and @doscareers: "One of my missions is to make sure we continue to attract the most talented, most dedicated people that we possibly can." Learn more about opportunities at the State Department: https://t.co/kI9OZWgyaZ
